evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap 50: Premature DAPT Discontinuation (Coronary)

gapsPushIds: Beta-blocker not prescribed post-MI with reduced LVEF

gapsPushIds: Consider ezetimibe add-on for LDL not at goal on statin
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-EZETIMIBE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-DIABETES-CONTROL: A1c Monitoring in CAD + Diabetes
gapsPushIds: HbA1c monitoring recommended for review in CAD patient with diabetes

gapsPushIds: Blood pressure monitoring recommended for review in CAD patient
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-BP-CONTROL

gapsPushIds: Post-CABG cardiac rehabilitation referral not documented

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-REHAB-MI: Post-MI cardiac rehab referral (CAD-046)
gapsPushIds: Post-MI cardiac rehabilitation referral not documented
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-REHAB-MI

gapsPushIds: Consider PCSK9 inhibitor for LDL not at goal on maximally tolerated statin
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-PCSK9

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-FFR: Fractional Flow Reserve for Intermediate Lesions
gapsPushIds: Consider physiologic assessment (FFR/iFR) for intermediate coronary lesions
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-FFR

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-COLCHICINE: Anti-Inflammatory Therapy with Colchicine
gapsPushIds: Consider low-dose colchicine for residual inflammatory risk in CAD
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-COLCHICINE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-OMEGA3: Icosapent Ethyl for Elevated Triglycerides
gapsPushIds: Consider icosapent ethyl for elevated triglycerides in CAD
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-OMEGA3

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-RANOLAZINE: Refractory Angina Treatment
gapsPushIds: Consider ranolazine for refractory angina on maximal anti-anginal therapy

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-STRESS-TEST: Stress Test Follow-up
gapsPushIds: Consider periodic stress testing or imaging follow-up in CAD

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-REVASCULARIZATION: Revascularization Assessment
gapsPushIds: Consider revascularization assessment for multivessel CAD with reduced LVEF
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-REVASCULARIZATION

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-ANTICOAG-AF: Anticoagulation in CAD + AF (Dual Pathway Therapy)
gapsPushIds: Consider oral anticoagulation in CAD patient with atrial fibrillation
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-ANTICOAG-AF

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-GLP1-DM: GLP-1 RA for CAD + Diabetes (CV Risk Reduction)
gapsPushIds: Consider GLP-1 RA for cardiovascular risk reduction in CAD + diabetes
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-GLP1-DM

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-SGLT2-DM: SGLT2i for CAD + Diabetes
gapsPushIds: Consider SGLT2i for cardiovascular risk reduction in CAD + diabetes
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-SGLT2-DM

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-BEMPEDOIC: Bempedoic Acid for Statin Intolerance
gapsPushIds: Consider bempedoic acid for statin-intolerant CAD patient with elevated LDL
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-BEMPEDOIC

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-FH-CASCADE: Familial hypercholesterolemia suspicion (severe LDL) without FH evaluation (CAD-013)
gapsPushIds: Severe LDL elevation (>=190): familial hypercholesterolemia evaluation and cascade screening gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-FH-CASCADE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-APOB: Apolipoprotein B residual-risk refinement (CAD-009)
gapsPushIds: Elevated apolipoprotein B (>=90 mg/dL) on statin: residual atherogenic risk gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-APOB

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-RADIATION-CAD: Radiation-induced coronary disease - aggressive risk-factor + surveillance (CAD-083)
gapsPushIds: Radiation-induced coronary disease: aggressive risk-factor modification + surveillance gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-RADIATION-CAD

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-VASCULITIS-CAD: Vasculitis-associated coronary disease - distinct management (CAD-084)
gapsPushIds: Vasculitis-associated coronary disease: vasculitis-specific coordinated management gap
evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-VASCULITIS-CAD

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // CAD-STIMULANT-CAD: Cocaine/methamphetamine-associated coronary disease (CAD-085) - SAFETY subgroup (BB caution)

evaluatorBlocks.name: CAD-STIMULANT-CAD

gapsPushIds: Consider depression screening for CAD patient
